title: FPS and Stuff Modpack
description:
My FPS Modpack: Elevate Your Gaming Experience 🚀
Welcome to my custom FPS modpack, designed to enhance your gameplay and take your FPS to the next level! My modpack adds more of Optimization in your game, aaaaand its has a lot of stuff mods, like Zoomify
body: - This is my FPS and stuff modpack for Minecraft 1.21+, in this modpack you can find mods like: Not Enough Animations, С2ME, Debugify, Uku's Armor Hud, Sodium, Sodium Extra, Iris Shaders and more! This modpack Directed to performance, beautyful and comfortable gameplay. My modpack adds a lot of optimization mods and stuff mods, like Zoomify, Advanced GUI, Apply Portal Overlays and Remove Reloading Screen, i wish you like this modpack, because its modpack for your comfortable playing!
